  "findings": [
    "Primary and secondary connections are landed in reverse on the transformer terminals."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Lock out and tag out the transformer circuit immediately.",
    "Disconnect the reversed primary and secondary conductors.",
    "Re-terminate the conductors to their correct respective primary and secondary terminals per the engineered drawings and manufacturer specifications.",
    "Verify proper grounding and bonding per NEC 250.30 before re-testing."
  ],
  "rationale": "Landing the primary and secondary connections in reverse creates an extremely hazardous step-up condition instead of the intended step-down voltage (or vice versa), posing an immediate risk of catastrophic equipment failure, insulation breakdown, and severe arc flash or electrocution hazards upon energization.",

    "NEC Art. 450",
    "NEC 250.30"
  ]
